_comment: 《凰谋》E02 装病的王爷 —— 全可灵中越·12秒版(主模板 huangmou-12s)。6拍全 type:video(kling I2V,关原声),每拍都是开场级视觉冲击,无图文软拍。把30s版9拍浓缩为6拍:砍搪塞/试探/假意顺从,台词压到一句一信息。层层抛新悬念+b04女主人设爆点。★语速本片加快:中文对白/内心 speed=1.2、越南语旁白 viSpeed=1.15(script.speed/viSpeed 本片覆盖,不动模板全局1.0)。★badge:前3秒顶部留白处弹出越南语『看短剧学中文』对话框特效,仅3s。关键帧全 nano-banana-pro/edit 喂定妆图,零多人nano-pro(抓腕拍只出昭华正脸,裴珩仅手入镜)。预算~$2.41<$3。

badge._comment: 前3秒顶部留白区弹出的引导标,对话框气泡。pairs=逐字对照:每个汉字对齐其越南语词、列间距拉大(用户 2026-07-19);sep=分隔点。有 pairs 时渲染成一排对照列,否则回落 textVi/textZh 两行。
badge.textVi: Xem phim ngắn · Học tiếng Trung

shots.content: Extreme close-up in a dark, dim red-candlelit bridal chamber: a pale, strong male hand shoots out from the shadow of the red wedding sickbed and clamps hard around the slender bare wrist of a stunningly beautiful young bride who has changed out of her heavy wedding robes into a thin, sheer pale cream-gold silk sleeping gauze robe that slips off one bare shoulder, hair loosened; she jolts and her eyes snap wide open in raw shock; ONLY her startled face is clearly visible, the man's face stays in deep shadow out of frame; tall red dragon-and-phoenix wedding candles flare bright around them.

video.motion: The pale hand suddenly clamps hard around her wrist; she jolts upright and her eyes snap wide open in shock and alarm; the candle flames flare and brighten sharply; her breath catches. Quick tense push-in on her face.

shots.content: In the dim red-candlelit bridal chamber, the young man who had been lying as a dying groom now pushes himself upright on the red wedding bed; his sickly pallor and frail air are utterly gone, replaced by a cold, sharp, commanding presence; he wears a deep wine-crimson silk sickbed robe with subtle gold trim (clearly NOT black), long black hair loose over his shoulders; his sharp cold eyes fix forward; his is the ONLY face in frame, imposing and fully alert.

video.motion: The man props himself up and rises to sit upright; his sickly weakness sloughs away into a cold, sharp, commanding stare; his robe and loose hair settle with the motion; the candlelight steadies and brightens. Slow imposing push-in.

captions.zh: 那个病秧子，忽然不装了
captions.pinyin: nà ge bìng yāng zi , hū rán bù zhuāng le
captions.local: Kẻ ốm yếu ấy, bỗng thôi giả vờ

shots.content: Tight medium close-up in the dim red-candlelit bridal chamber: the young man — now fully alert and commanding, all sickliness gone — looms in close toward the viewer's point of view, leaning down over the bride; he wears a deep wine-crimson silk robe with subtle gold trim (clearly NOT black), long black hair loose; the corner of his mouth curls into a cold, faint, predatory half-smile, his sharp eyes fixed forward with calm menace; warm candlelight rims his face; his is the ONLY face in frame, dominating and oppressive.

video.motion: The man leans in closer toward the viewer, the corner of his mouth curling into a cold faint smile as he speaks; his sharp eyes lock forward with predatory calm; candlelight flickers across his face. Slow oppressive push-in.

captions.zh: 留你一命，替本王做一件事
captions.pinyin: liú nǐ yí mìng , tì běn wáng zuò yí jiàn shì
captions.local: Tha cô một mạng, làm cho bổn vương một việc

shots.content: Close-up of the beautiful young bride's face and one bare shoulder in dim red candlelight; she wears a thin sheer pale cream-gold silk sleeping gauze robe slipping off her shoulder, hair loosened; her initial fear is visibly cooling into sharp, calculating resolve; her eyes narrow with cold, intelligent focus, jaw set; single face in frame.

video.motion: Her fearful expression hardens; her eyes narrow into cold, sharp calculation; her gaze steadies with dangerous resolve; candlelight flickers on her face. Slow push-in on her eyes.

captions.pinyin: xiān huó xià qù , zài tán bié de

shots.content: Pre-dawn courtyard of a grand imperial mansion in cold blue twilight; rows of red palace lanterns sway and tremble as if disturbed; thin mist drifts low over the empty grey stone courtyard; one lantern lies fallen and guttering on the ground; an ominous, unsettled hush just before alarm; environment only, absolutely no people.

video.motion: The red lanterns sway and swing as if disturbed by rushing movement; cold mist drifts across the empty courtyard; the fallen lantern's flame gutters and flickers; a chill wind stirs. Slow uneasy pan across the courtyard.

captions.pinyin: tiān méi liàng , wáng fǔ jiù luàn le
captions.local: Trời chưa sáng, vương phủ đã loạn

shots.content: Cold misty dawn beside an old stone well in the mansion courtyard; a full-length wide view of the beautiful young bride standing, wearing a thin sheer pale cream-gold silk sleeping gauze robe with a high side slit that reveals one long slender bare leg, a light gauze shawl draped over her shoulders, barefoot, hair loosened; she watches with cold forensic sharpness, her eyes narrowing; over her shoulder in the blurred mid-ground, two servants seen from behind carry out the soaked, pale, lifeless body of a young maid on a wooden board, water dripping, the dead maid's face turned away; ONLY the bride's face is clearly visible among the living; cold blue dawn light, wisps of mist.

video.motion: The bride's gaze sharpens and narrows coldly as she watches; behind her the servants carry the dripping corpse past; mist drifts through the cold air; her expression settles into grim, certain suspicion. Slow push-in on her cold eyes.

captions.pinyin: luò shuǐ ? bù , shì yǒu rén shā le tā
captions.local: Chết đuối? Không, có kẻ đã giết nàng
